title: 凿壁偷光
meaning: 凿壁偷光形容在艰苦的条件下勤奋学习。故事讲述了西汉匡衡因为家里穷买不起灯油，就在墙壁上凿了个小洞，借邻居家的烛光读书，最终成为大学问家的故事。

scenes.title: 贫寒之家
scenes.description: Kuang Heng sitting alone in a dim, sparsely furnished room at night, looking sadly at an empty desk where no lamp exists.
scenes.prompt: a young Chinese boy named Kuang Heng, wearing simple rustic Han dynasty peasant clothing in muted earth tones, short black hair tied in a traditional topknot, determined and focused facial expression, slender build, a young Chinese boy named Kuang Heng, wearing simple rustic Han dynasty peasant clothing in muted earth tones, short black hair tied in a traditional topknot, determined and focused facial expression, slender build, sitting alone in a dim, sparsely furnished ancient Chinese room at night, looking sadly at an empty wooden desk, no lamp, cold moonlight streaming through window, soft watercolor illustration style, warm and cozy lighting, gentle brushstrokes, suitable for children aged 3-8, pastel color palette with emphasis on warm yellow candlelight against cool blue night shadows, storybook aesthetic, clean lines, no text visible, wide angle scene, wide angle scene showing the emptiness of the room, soft watercolor illustration style, warm and cozy lighting, gentle brushstrokes, suitable for children aged 3-8, pastel color palette with emphasis on warm yellow candlelight against cool blue night shadows, storybook aesthetic, clean lines, no text visible
scenes.narration:
匡衡家很穷，
买不起灯油。
夜晚黑漆漆，
读书好发愁。
scenes.compositionHint: wide angle scene showing the emptiness of the room

scenes.title: 发现微光
scenes.description: Close up of Kuang Heng's face illuminated by a faint beam of light coming from a crack in the wall, his eyes wide with hope.
scenes.prompt: a young Chinese boy named Kuang Heng, wearing simple rustic Han dynasty peasant clothing in muted earth tones, short black hair tied in a traditional topknot, determined and focused facial expression, slender build, a young Chinese boy named Kuang Heng, wearing simple rustic Han dynasty peasant clothing in muted earth tones, short black hair tied in a traditional topknot, determined and focused facial expression, slender build, close up of face illuminated by a faint beam of golden light coming from a small crack in the wall, eyes wide with hope and curiosity, soft watercolor illustration style, warm and cozy lighting, gentle brushstrokes, suitable for children aged 3-8, pastel color palette with emphasis on warm yellow candlelight against cool blue night shadows, storybook aesthetic, clean lines, no text visible, close-up shot, close-up shot focusing on the face and light, soft watercolor illustration style, warm and cozy lighting, gentle brushstrokes, suitable for children aged 3-8, pastel color palette with emphasis on warm yellow candlelight against cool blue night shadows, storybook aesthetic, clean lines, no text visible
scenes.narration:
忽然看见墙缝里，
透进一丝亮光。
那是邻居家的灯火，
照亮了心房。
scenes.compositionHint: close-up shot focusing on the face and light

scenes.title: 凿壁取光
scenes.description: Kuang Heng using a small chisel to make a hole in the wooden wall, dust flying, focused expression.
scenes.prompt: a young Chinese boy named Kuang Heng, wearing simple rustic Han dynasty peasant clothing in muted earth tones, short black hair tied in a traditional topknot, determined and focused facial expression, slender build, a young Chinese boy named Kuang Heng, wearing simple rustic Han dynasty peasant clothing in muted earth tones, short black hair tied in a traditional topknot, determined and focused facial expression, slender build, holding a small wooden chisel, actively making a small hole in a thin wooden partition wall, tiny dust particles floating in the air, focused expression, soft watercolor illustration style, warm and cozy lighting, gentle brushstrokes, suitable for children aged 3-8, pastel color palette with emphasis on warm yellow candlelight against cool blue night shadows, storybook aesthetic, clean lines, no text visible, medium shot, medium shot capturing the action of chiseling, soft watercolor illustration style, warm and cozy lighting, gentle brushstrokes, suitable for children aged 3-8, pastel color palette with emphasis on warm yellow candlelight against cool blue night shadows, storybook aesthetic, clean lines, no text visible
scenes.narration:
拿起小凿子，
轻轻凿洞孔。
不怕手起泡，
只怕天不亮。

scenes.title: 借光苦读
scenes.description: Kuang Heng sitting by the wall, reading a bamboo slip book, his face clearly lit by the bright beam of light from the hole.

scenes.narration:

字字都看清，

scenes.narration:

星星眨眼睛。
匡衡不睡觉，
知识装在心。
